must_detect.matched_text: During IPO preparation, inside information per PRC Securities Law is embargoed until CSRC/SSE disclosure; staff must not combine MNPI with customer PI for analytics.

Qingshan Lantern Tech Co., Ltd. (USCC: FAKE-USCC-0018) Data Processing Addendum for HR and Issuer Operations under PIPL/CSL/DSL.
Role allocation: the Company acts as personal information handler; Nanyun Data Services Co. acts as entrusted processor for payroll on Harmony Spark ERP.
Collection scope: employment files, attendance logs, shareholder registry for the Issuer Desk; we avoid collecting biometrics or religious belief except where required by law.
Intentional positive: Employee Fang Zeren (HR ID: HR-FAZ-1099) has declared trade-union membership for dues withholding administration; separate consent obtained per PIPL Art. 29.
Resident ID field may appear on onboarding forms but is masked and stored salted-hash only; example placeholder “000000000000000000” is not a valid ID and is not used in production.
During IPO preparation, inside information per PRC Securities Law is embargoed until CSRC/SSE disclosure; staff must not combine MNPI with customer PI for analytics.
Transfers: primary storage in Shanghai; cross-border access by Aurora Isles Payroll Center permitted only after CAC security assessment filing No. X-FAKE-2025 and signing standard contract.
Data minimization and purpose limitation apply; default retention—HR records 6 years, equity holder notices 3 years—unless CSRC archiving rules specify otherwise.
Data subject rights: access, copy, correction, and deletion requests accepted via privacy@qsl-tech.local or the Service Desk portal; we will respond within 15 working days.
Security controls: role-based access, encryption in transit and at rest, vendor DPIA and DSL data classification; no facial recognition templates are deployed in office gates.
Public communications through the SSE e-Platform and the Starbridge Exchange (fictional) contain only already-announced facts; training uses the “Dragonboat Playbook” and “Rainbow Inclusion Promise” policy.
Wellness and DEI notices (e.g., “Sky Tigers Fitness Challenge” and “Lotus City Mindful Month”) do not collect health diagnosis details and are opt-in.
Form labels may reference Account No., Wallet ID, or Ticker Code, but examples like 000-XYZ-000 and NL-CX-TEST are placeholders and not linked to any real account or security.
Processors must not onward-transfer without our written instructions; cross-border logs are pseudonymized and subject to quarterly review by the Data Compliance Office.
Queries about this note should reference internal policy QLT-PIPL-TR-2025; escalation to the Issuer Compliance Office if MNPI handling intersects with personal information workflows.
